3   Add trace quality audit query               proposed  normal  Future agents can see trace quality regressions quickly and Phase 3 observability has a concrete starting point.                 
4   Triage friction into backlog outcomes       proposed  normal  Backlog becomes a cleaner improvement queue and old friction stops competing with current Phase 2 follow-up work.                
5   Detect invalid zero-token benchmark runs    proposed  normal  Prevents invalid benchmark reruns from being mistaken for harness regressions.                                                   
8   Benchmark needs local Phase 5 install path  proposed  normal  Phase benchmark runs can exercise the intended branch state instead of a stale published CLI
